arts.ttl: Arne Slot says that Jurgen Klopp is welcome back 'any time he wants' at Liverpool - revealing he's already invited the German to Anfield twice
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Arne Slot has revealed that he twice invited Jurgen Klopp to matches at Anfield and says the former Liverpool manager is welcome to visit the Reds training ground whenever he likes.

arts.ttl: Guardiola speechless over Jamie Carragher’s comments on Erling Haaland’s absence
arts.sum: Manchester City’s top scorer did not get off the bench as the Premier League champions crashed out of the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: This season puts previous success into perspective, says Guardiola
arts.sum: “Maybe in the future this will be an incredible season for the Club to understand how difficult everything is,” he said in Friday’s press conference. Pep Guardiola believes City’s difficulties in 2024/25 only further emphasise how incredible his trophy-laden era at Manchester City has been so far.

arts.ttl: Angry Man City boss Pep Guardiola FUMES at Jamie Carragher for suggesting Erling Haaland missed Real Madrid game because of 'Rudiger-itis'
arts.sum: Guardiola has expressed his disgust at TV pundit Carragher after he appeared to question whether Haaland skipped Wednesday's game in Madrid because he was scared of Antonio Rudiger.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares theory on Liverpool vs Man City rivalry after Jurgen Klopp exit
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has had his say on the rivalry with Manchester City after the two clubs slugged it out for Premier League glory during Jurgen Klopp's tenure

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola fires back at Jamie Carragher for 'not true' Erling Haaland claims
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has issued a stinging response to pundit Jamie Carragher after he accused Erling Haaland of skipping their clash with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola denies Haaland missed Real Madrid defeat due to ‘Rüdiger-itis’
arts.sum: City manager rules out Jamie Carragher’s defender claim ‘It’s not true. He was crazy to play but had a knee problem’ Pep Guardiola was stunned into silence by Jamie Carragher’s suggestion that Erling Haaland missed Manchester City’s defeat at Real Madrid because he did not want to face Antonio Rüdiger. The Norwegian was an unused substitute in Spain after telling Guardiola he was unfit to take any part because of a knee injury suffered against Newcastle. Haaland is a doubt for Sunday’s home game against Carragher’s former club Liverpool. Carragher said on CBS’s Champions League coverage on Wednesday that the striker might be suffering from “Rüdiger-itis” and that is why he told Guardiola he was not available for selection. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Big Question: Will Man City v Liverpool produce another twist in title race?
arts.sum: Football writer Ben Bloom feels a first Liverpool league win at the Etihad Stadium since Pep Guardiola took charge in 2016 would heap the pressure on Arsenal in the title race. Manchester City and Liverpool : the only two teams to win the Premier League over the past seven years, and the biggest rivals of that era.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Star forward likely to leave in summer window despite club being Premier League title favourites
arts.sum: Liverpool may part company with one of their forwards in the summer transfer window, but they could still leave Anfield with a Premier League winners medal.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson says the Premier League title is 'one million per cent' heading to Liverpool after Arsenal's loss to West Ham as he claims Mikel Merino played like a 'fish up a tree' in his new position
arts.sum: Liverpool will travel to Manchester City on Sunday but Merson claimed that even a 7-0 defeat for the leaders would not be enough to reignite Arsenal's hopes of winning the title.
